title: Legal scholar and former NUJS Vice-Chancellor Prof MP Singh passes away
description: Legal academician, author and jurist Prof (Dr) MP Singh has passed away at the age of 85. Prof Singh earned his LL.M. from Columbia University and started his academic career as a lecturer at University of Meerut.He has served as Vice-Chancellor of West Bengal National University of Juridical Sciences (WBNUJS), Kolkata; Dean of Faculty of Law and Head, Department of Law, Delhi University. He had served as Head of Law Division at the South Asia Institute, University of Heidelberg.Prof MP Singh wa
